* Exemplo com subrotinas internas
DEFINE DATA LOCAL
  1 #BASE  (N10.2)
  1 #TAXA  (N5.4)
  1 #IMPOSTO (N10.2)
  1 #LIQUIDO (N10.2)
END-DEFINE
*
MOVE 8000.00 TO #BASE
PERFORM CALCULAR-IMPOSTO
COMPUTE #LIQUIDO = #BASE - #IMPOSTO
WRITE 'Base:    ' #BASE
WRITE 'Imposto: ' #IMPOSTO
WRITE 'Líquido: ' #LIQUIDO
END
*
DEFINE SUBROUTINE CALCULAR-IMPOSTO
  IF #BASE > 5000
    MOVE 0.275 TO #TAXA
  ELSE
    MOVE 0.150 TO #TAXA
  END-IF
  MULTIPLY #BASE BY #TAXA /* calcula imposto
  MOVE #TAXA TO #IMPOSTO
END-SUBROUTINE
